legacyjava/core/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-surefire-plugin version to a newer snapshot compatible with the build environment.

legacyjava/core/src/main/java/org/javafi.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for modern string interpolation.
Replace String.format with String.formatted for modern string interpolation.
Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() introduced in Java 21.
Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() introduced in Java 21.
legacyjava/core/src/main/java/org/javafi.why_exists: List.get(0) is not deprecated but List.getFirst() is the preferred modern API; however, this change is often part of a broader modernization. Strictly speaking, get(0) still compiles on J21. But the prompt implies migration recipes. Let's look closer. Actually, List.getFirst() was added in Java 21. Using it requires J21. If the target is J21, this is a polishment (modernization) unless the old code was broken. The old code works on J21. So this is polishment.
